raw_consumer_statement: The following is additional information that I did not include in my earlier complaint. Booked a hotel through American Express XXXX XXXX XXXX at the XXXX XXXX XXXX in XXXX, XXXX for XXXX XXXX XXXX. My flight was cancelled and I reached out to American Express XXXX XXXX XXXX asking them to contact the hotel to change my reservation and the customer care agent did reach out to the hotel and told me that the hotel would " not budge '' on allowing me to make any changes to the reservation. As a result, I cancelled my trip and have been trying to get a refund from American Express. and filed a previous complaint. In AmEx 's response to the CFPB stated that the hotel offered me the option of checking in a day later ( XX/XX/XXXX ). That is not what the AmEx agent relayed to me when I called American Express Platinum Travel on XX/XX/XXXX. The agent told me that the hotel " would not budge '' on letting me make the change. In trying to get refunded. I reached out to the hotel directly and was told that since my reservation is not paid directly to the hotel, but from a third party ( in this case American Express Platinum Travel Service ), that they recommend that I reach out directly to AmEx for a full or partial refund. I have done so and been denied. I am attaching said email from the hotel indicating that this issue should be resolved with American Express. I have been an American Express cardholder for 34 year and XXXX of those years have been as a Platinum cardholder.
